title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Grass Wonder...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Trainer, look at all of those Umamusume
plushies. They seem to be prizes for that claw
machine.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious which racers there are. Though it does
seem rather noisy inside...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder is clearly interested, but the shop's
atmosphere is making her a little uncomfortable.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to see much of anything from here. I
wonder if there's a plushie of Spe or El.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Just watching from the sidelines wouldn't feel
right. If only there were a way I could help you,
then it would be like a joint effort.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That sounds like it would help. Very well, I'll be
your voice of support.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll give it my all. Go, go, Trainer! Go, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
